import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    let line_opt = lines.get(i)
    match line_opt
    when Some(line)
      if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
        let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
        let second_opt = tokens.get(1)
        match second_opt
        when Some(tok)
          let n_opt = string.parse_int(tok)
          match n_opt
          when Some(n)
            sum = sum + n
          when None
            ()
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
